title: meliosma recurvata
intro: Meliosma recurvata, also known as the 'Curly Bells', is a species of flowering plant in the family Sabiaceae, native to the tropical regions of Asia and Australia. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Meliosma recurvata include its ability to treat digestive issues, fever, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and roots are commonly used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
